books.title: When Life Begins
books.author: Abu Yahya
books.description: A comprehensive guide to understanding the true purpose of life and the journey of the soul. This book has transformed thousands of lives globally.

books.title: God Speaks
books.author: Abu Yahya
books.description: A comprehensive guide to understanding the true purpose of life and the journey of the soul. This book has transformed thousands of lives globally.

books.title: Aakhri Jang
books.author: Abu Yahya
books.description: A captivating novel serving as a sequel to 'Jab Zindagi Shuru Hogi'. It delves into the eternal battle between humans and Satan.

books.title: Adhuri Kahani
books.author: Abu Yahya
books.description: The concluding novel of the series that began with 'When Life Begins'. It provides a map of heavenly life and spiritual growth.

books.title: By That Time
books.author: Abu Yahya
books.description: An English translation of the profound work exploring time and its significance in a human's life from an Islamic perspective.

books.title: Hadees-e-Dil
books.author: Abu Yahya
books.description: A powerful Islamic book focusing on character building and the internal transformation of the heart.

books.title: Incomplete Story
books.author: Abu Yahya
books.description: The English version of 'Adhuri Kahani', narrating a journey of spirituality and personal growth.

books.title: Khuda Bol Raha Hai
books.author: Abu Yahya
books.description: A unique narrative describing the grandeur of the Holy Quran and its transformative power.

books.title: Last War
books.author: Abu Yahya
books.description: The English translation of 'Aakhri Jang', focusing on the battle between human moral foundations and satanic intrigues.

books.title: Mulaqat
books.author: Abu Yahya
books.description: Addresses significant academic and reformatory issues, offering a compelling description of the lives of Prophets.

books.title: Qasam Us Waqt Ki
books.author: Abu Yahya
books.description: A best-selling novel exploring the accountability of humans and the reality of the hereafter.

books.title: Quran Ka Matloob Insaan
books.author: Abu Yahya
books.description: Explores the personality traits God desires in individuals based on the Quran.

books.title: Rehmaton Kay Saye Mein
books.author: Abu Yahya
books.description: A guide on the blessings of Ramadan and how to spend this holy month to achieve maximum spiritual benefits.

books.title: Teesri Roshni
books.author: Abu Yahya
books.description: Abu Yahya's autobiography detailing his struggle for truth and analysis of sectarian attitudes.

books.title: Wohi Rahguzar
books.author: Abu Yahya
books.description: A thought-provoking travelogue detailing journeys through Australia and Thailand.
